rollback_scope: revert AO2 merge commit d57192a7d63a2d6cfbe66c08d4cbda516af46c78 through a reviewed PR
remove node-specific Atlas evidence if the node is reopened
preserve the prior AO2 approval digest contract and do not apply any provider change
rollback_command: Prepare a reviewed AO2 revert PR for the node merge and regenerate the Atlas readback; do not mutate main directly.
data_loss_risk: none; the change is a fail-closed approval guard and all evidence is digest-addressed
